srcRoot.description: Root directory that contains application source files.

entryFile.description: Application entry file used by the Sculptor bootstrap.

enumDescriptions: Use tsx for direct TypeScript execution during development.
Use nodemon for restart-based development workflows.
devServer.markdownDescription: Development server used when running `sc dev`.

routing.description: Routing style used by the framework.

enumDescriptions: A mixed mode that supports both controllers and functional routes.
style.markdownDescription: Controls the routing style used by the framework.

generate.markdownDescription: Automatically generates matching test files when resources are created.

enumDescriptions: Use Vitest for generated and scaffolded test suites.
framework.markdownDescription: Testing framework used by the generated project.

frameworkLock.markdownDescription: Locks the framework version and conventions for the project scaffold.

dogMode.markdownDescription: Enables Bruno, Coki and Dodie themed logger output.
